phobias.name: Acrophobia
phobias.description: Fear of heights; fear of falling or being in high places.

phobias.name: Pyrophobia
phobias.description: Fear of fire; intense dread of flames or burning.

phobias.name: Eisoptrophobia
phobias.description: Fear of mirrors; fear of seeing one's own reflection or spirits in glass.

phobias.name: Odontophobia
phobias.description: Fear of teeth; fear of dental work, being bitten, or exposed teeth.

phobias.name: Bibliophobia
phobias.description: Fear of books; often specifically directed at occult or forbidden literature.

phobias.name: Hemophobia
phobias.description: Fear of blood; severe distress at the sight of wounds or bleeding.

phobias.name: Necrophobia
phobias.description: Fear of the dead; intense dread of corpses and death-related objects.

phobias.name: Arachnophobia
phobias.description: Fear of spiders; irrational dread of arachnids.

phobias.name: Telephonophobia
phobias.description: Fear of telephones; anxiety about making or receiving calls.

phobias.name: Xenophobia
phobias.description: Fear of strangers; irrational dislike or fear of unfamiliar people.

manias.name: Nosomania
manias.description: Hypochondriacal delusions; obsession with having undiagnosed medical conditions.

manias.name: Amenomania
manias.description: Maniacal joy; unnatural and excessive happiness despite dire circumstances.

manias.name: Heliomania
manias.description: Uncontrolled laughter; an irresistible urge to laugh inappropriately.

manias.name: Kleptomania
manias.description: Irrational urge to steal; inability to resist taking items that aren't needed.

manias.name: Pseudomania
manias.description: Irrational urge to lie; compulsive creation of false stories or identities.

manias.name: Clazomania
manias.description: Irrational urge to scream; uncontrollable shouting or yelling.

manias.name: Algomania
manias.description: Obsession with pain; an abnormal desire to experience or witness physical pain.

manias.name: Dikemania
manias.description: Obsession with justice; an obsessive need for 'fairness' often leading to vigilantism.

manias.name: Agatomania
manias.description: Pathological kindness; obsessive helpfulness that can be dangerous or misplaced.

manias.name: Bibliokleptomania
manias.description: Urge to steal books; a specific compulsion to take rare or mystical volumes.
